body: BEGIN OPEN c FOR SELECT * FROM t; END
BEGIN OPEN c SCROLL FOR SELECT 1; END
BEGIN OPEN c NO SCROLL FOR SELECT 1; END
BEGIN OPEN c FOR EXECUTE q USING x; END
BEGIN FETCH c INTO x; END
BEGIN FETCH NEXT FROM c INTO x; END
BEGIN FETCH PRIOR FROM c INTO x; END
BEGIN FETCH ABSOLUTE 3 FROM c INTO x; END
BEGIN FETCH RELATIVE -1 FROM c INTO x; END
BEGIN FETCH LAST FROM c INTO x; END

comment: FETCH with a multi-row direction (count) is an error
body: BEGIN FETCH FORWARD 2 FROM c INTO x; END
error: FETCH statement cannot return multiple rows

comment: FETCH ALL is a multi-row direction, an error for FETCH
body: BEGIN FETCH ALL FROM c INTO x; END
error: FETCH statement cannot return multiple rows

comment: MOVE FORWARD count with IN (canonicalizes to FROM)
body: BEGIN MOVE FORWARD 2 IN c; END
BEGIN MOVE ALL FROM c; END
BEGIN OPEN c FOR SELECT 1; LOOP FETCH c INTO r; EXIT WHEN r IS NULL; END LOOP; CLOSE c; END
